name: Rust Toolchain (Global)
description: Installs the Rust toolchain globally using rustup. Supports toolchain selection, component install, and validation.

toolchain.description: Rust toolchain to install (e.g. stable, nightly, 1.77.2)

components.description: Space-separated list of rustup components to install

github.copilot.chat.codeGeneration.instr.text: This dev container has the Rust toolchain installed globally via rustup. `cargo`, `rustc`, `rustup`, `rustfmt`, and `clippy` are all available on the PATH. Use `cargo build` to compile, `cargo test` to run tests, `cargo clippy -- -D warnings` for strict linting, and `cargo fmt` to format code. The toolchain version can be stable, nightly, or a pinned release.
